items.title: Top wins
items.detail: Ben-Hur, Titanic and The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King share the 11-win record.

items.title: Timeline
items.detail: 1929 first ceremony, 1953 first televised ceremony, 2002 Dolby Theatre era, 2027 99th ceremony.

items.title: Most nominated films
items.detail: All About Eve, Titanic and La La Land share the record with 14 nominations each.

items.title: First Casting Oscar
items.detail: The Casting category was awarded for the first time at the 98th Academy Awards in 2026.
